tagline: Begin Your Home Wellness Journey Today!

hero.headline:
Your Backyard Oasis Starts Right
Here
hero.subheadline: For three generations, the Ghiz family has helped Arizona families transform their backyards into personal wellness retreats. Visit our 15,000 sq ft showroom, soak before you buy, and discover why we're the world's top Jacuzzi dealer.
checkmarks: Try before you buy in private soak rooms

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Your Complete Home<br class="hidden md:block"> Wellness Destination
services.subtitle: From hot tubs and swim spas to saunas and cold plunges, we bring resort-level relaxation to your backyard with expert guidance and world-class service.

cards.title: Jacuzzi Hot Tubs & Sundance Spas
cards.description: Over 40 models on display from the brands we trust most. Soak in our private rooms, compare features side by side, and find the perfect fit for your family.

cards.title: Swim Spas & Fitness
cards.description: Year-round aquatic fitness and relaxation in one versatile unit. Swim, exercise, and unwind without the footprint or cost of a traditional pool.

cards.title: Saunas & Cold Plunges
cards.description: Infrared and traditional saunas paired with cold plunge systems for complete contrast therapy. Recovery and wellness right in your own backyard.

cards.title: Backyard Design & Hardscapes
cards.description: Full backyard transformations including hardscapes, outdoor kitchens, landscape design, and furnishings. We turn empty yards into personal retreats.

cards.title: Patio Heating & Cooling
cards.description: Extend your outdoor season year-round with climate control solutions built for Arizona living. Enjoy your backyard even in the peak of summer.

cards.title: Service & Repairs
cards.description: Our in-house, factory-trained technicians handle hot tub maintenance, chemical balancing, and repairs. Award-winning service backs every product we sell.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Walk through 15,000 square feet of fully-landscaped vignettes. See, touch, and soak in the products before you decide. No pressure, just honest guidance from our family to yours.

steps.title: Design Your Perfect Setup
steps.description: Our backyard specialists help you choose the right hot tub, spa, or complete outdoor living package tailored to your space, lifestyle, and budget.

steps.title: Relax — We Handle the Rest
steps.description: From white-glove delivery and professional installation to ongoing maintenance and support, we take care of everything so you can start enjoying your backyard immediately.

about.label: Why Families Choose Us
about.headline: Three Generations of Backyard Expertise — One Family Mission
about.description: Founded by David and Melanie Ghiz in 2014, Imagine Backyard Living carries on a family legacy that began in 1958 when David's father George launched Paddock Pool & Spa. Today, we operate the world's #1 volume single-store Jacuzzi and Sundance dealership from our Scottsdale showroom. Every customer service award Jacuzzi offers — we've won it, every year since opening. That's not a slogan. That's our standard.

features.title: Factory-Trained Technicians
features.description: Every technician on our team is factory-certified by Jacuzzi and Sundance. Your investment is serviced by experts who know these products inside and out.

features.title: Try Before You Buy
features.description: Our private soak rooms and landscaped showroom vignettes let you experience products firsthand. No guessing, no buyer's remorse — just confidence.

features.title: Award-Winning Service, Every Year
features.description: We've won every Jacuzzi customer service award since 2014. When you buy from us, you're backed by the best support team in the industry.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Exceptional Value.
pricing.subtitle: Every product comes with expert installation, a factory warranty, and our award-winning service team behind it. No hidden fees, no surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Total Confidence" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with your purchase or any service visit, we'll make it right — no excuses, no runaround. We've built our reputation on treating every customer like family, and we back that promise with the same award-winning service that made us the #1 Jacuzzi dealer in the world.

faqs.question: Can I really try a hot tub before I buy it?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our Scottsdale showroom features two private soak rooms where you can experience different models firsthand. Just bring a swimsuit and towel — we'll handle the rest. It's the best way to find your perfect fit.

faqs.question: Do you offer delivery and installation?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every purchase includes white-glove delivery and professional installation by our factory-trained team. We handle electrical coordination, placement, and a full walkthrough so you're soaking comfortably from day one.

faqs.question: What brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We're an authorized dealer of Jacuzzi Hot Tubs and Sundance Spas — two of the most trusted names in the industry. We also carry Jacuzzi saunas, swim spas, cold plunges, and massage chairs. Over 40 models are on display in our showroom.

faqs.question: Do you service hot tubs you didn't sell?
faqs.answer: Yes, our in-house service department works on most major hot tub brands. Whether it's routine maintenance, water chemistry, or a repair, our factory-trained technicians can help.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Scottsdale, Phoenix, Paradise Valley, Cave Creek, Fountain Hills, Mesa, Tempe, Chandler, Gilbert, and the greater Maricopa County area. Contact us to confirm service availability in your location.

testimonials.name: Josh L.
testimonials.text: David and the team are very knowledgeable about the product. Excellent customer service throughout the whole process from Hello to installation to after-care follow-up.

testimonials.name: Ty C.
testimonials.text: From the sales, install, and service these guys are wonderful and truly care about the customer and the customer experience.

testimonials.name: Shelby M.
testimonials.text: For the past year, we were looking for a spa to put in our backyard. After searching we found Imagine Backyard Living. We are pleased with our spa. The people that helped us were nice. We recommend Imagine Backyard Living.
